text:
Solarpunk launch trailer – Nintendo Switch 2 gets peaceful survival adventure game

To celebrate the launch of Solarpunk, Rokaplay and Cyberwave readied a launch trailer. We saw the peaceful survival adventure title on Nintendo Switch this week. Here’s an overview with more details about the game: Set high above the clouds in a vibrant world of floating islands, Solarpunk invites players to build a peaceful life powered entirely by renewable energy. From...

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Nintendo issues statement about recent data breach

Nintendo issued an official statement following reports yesterday that the company was impacted by a data breach. For those that missed the news, SHADOWBYT3$ said it obtained 859MB of Nintendo employee data through TinyPulse. Employee names, bank statements, employee IDs and reports, analytics, and more were said to be affected. With today’s statement, Nintendo confirms that a breach took place....

The post Nintendo issues statement about recent data breach appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

text:
List of all Nintendo Switch demos

Thousands of games are currently available on Nintendo Switch, and there are a ton of demos out there for many of them. Not just Nintendo, but also third-parties are offering demos. author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Leafy Corner announced for Nintendo Switch

Developer Fireline Games has announced that its new cozy title, Leafy Corner, is heading to Nintendo Switch on July 30. In this charming shop management game, players take charge of a small plant store, where they’ll grow, sell, and care for a wide variety of real-life plant species. From nurturing your collection to helping customers find the perfect greenery, Leafy...

The post Leafy Corner announced for Nintendo Switch appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
What Have You Done Father announced for Nintendo Switch, out today

Darkania Works has just announced that its new psychological thriller What Have You Done Father is launching on Nintendo Switch today. The game follows a young priest whose forbidden affair takes a sinister turn when a woman is found dead inside his rectory. The truth gradually emerges through diaries, photographs, and locked rooms, drawing inspiration from classic noir cinema. Here’s...

text:
Minecraft 26.30 update out now, patch notes – Chaos Cubed is here

Minecraft just released its latest big update with version 26.30, with Chaos Cubed landing in the game. Sulfur is a brand new addition to the game with a new Sulfur Cubes mob plus more. author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Final Fantasy Resonance devs comment on why turn-based RPGs are resurging

One of the biggest surprises from the Nintendo Direct on June 9 was undoubtedly Final Fantasy Resonance, a reimagining of Brave Exvius featuring a brand-new story, gameplay enhancements, HD-2D visuals and newly created cinematic sequences. Beyond those additions, however, one of the most notable aspects of the game is the franchise’s return to turn-based combat. While the style never completely...

The post Final Fantasy Resonance devs comment on why turn-based RPGs are resurging appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

text:
Case Solved: The London Files, a cozy noir puzzle game, announced for Nintendo Switch

SpecNext, along with Minimol Games, have passed along the news that Case Solved: The London Files is coming to Nintendo Switch. The title launches this summer. Case Solved: The London Files is a cozy noir puzzle game. In the 1960s-inspired caper, players will solve a series of murders in the capital with logic to figure out whodunnit. Everything you need...

text:
Observer: System Redux will have a Nintendo Switch 2 physical release

Today, Meridiem announced that it will release a physical version of Observer: System Redux in partnership with Bloober Team. This will be available on October 30, 2026. Fans will be able to grab the game’s limited edition. It comes with a copy of the game, a special case, a lenticular 3D postcard, in-game ad cards, and digital content. Note that...

The post Observer: System Redux will have a Nintendo Switch 2 physical release appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Just Press the Button, a a dystopian narrative game, incoming for Nintendo Switch

Sonomio Games is releasing Just Press the Button on Nintendo Switch this week, the studio has announced. The title launches on June 18, 2026. Just Press the Button – an exclusive release for the console – is a dystopian narrative experience about obedience, ambition, and the cost of success. You’ll be a part of Enterprise Corp and press a button...
